response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with ~15 years of fullstack experience, current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js product work, and directly relevant AI-agent development (MCP code generators, agentic tooling). Strong testing culture (TDD, test libraries, workshops) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) align well with the role. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no Nest.js exposure, frontend history leans more Ember than React, and Vitest/Jest/Playwright are not explicitly named, though the deep testing background suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, matching the required AI agent development skill
Deep TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across multiple product companies, plus MongoDB, MySQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks and taught testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned, the primary backend framework for the role
React exposure appears limited to one role; much of the frontend history is Ember.js
Required testing tools (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) and Kotlin/Python are not explicitly listed

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited React depth
